UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Information stored for each registered customer

role.description: Role assigned to the user for access control

last_login.description: Timestamp of the user's last login session

created_at.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

addresses.description: List of delivery addresses saved by the user

Order.title: Purchase Order
Order.description: A grocery procurement procurement order containing items and real-time delivery state

userId.description: The UID of the user who placed this order

userEmail.description: The email of the user who placed this order

items.description: List of cart items included in the order

subtotal.description: Item subtotal cost before discounts or delivery

discount.description: Discount applied from matching promo campaigns

status.description: Current dispatch and transition stage of the order

paymentMethod.description: Chosen payment route (e.g. UPI, cash, cards)

deliveryPartner.description: Current rider or delivery agent details if assigned

Rider.title: Delivery Rider Partner
Rider.description: An administrative delivery agent account created and assigned by Admin managers

isActiveOnDuty.description: Whether current rider is active on shift duty

lat.description: Current latitudinal GPS coordinate of the courier

lng.description: Current longitudinal GPS coordinate of the courier

battery.description: Current battery charge state percentage of rider's tracker device

avatar.description: Photo URL of the rider partner

activeDeliveries.description: Count of orders currently being delivered by this partner

avgDeliveryTime.description: Average minutes to fulfill an assigned delivery

UserAddress.title: User Address
UserAddress.description: User saved address details, permanent and private to their account

/profiles/{userId}.description: Collection storing basic user profiles keyed by their Firebase Auth UID

/riders/{riderId}.description: Collection storing all admin created rider accounts

/users/{userId}/addresses/{addressId}.description: Subcollection under user's private document containing their saved addresses
